title: I have question about Quotes and Invoices view
excerpt:
Hey Friends! 
Can I connect these Items with any Board in ‘Quotes & Invoices’ view, so that we don’t have to add the items manually?

posts.author: sendtech (David Nizri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Friends!

Can I connect these Items with any Board in ‘Quotes & Invoices’ view, so that we don’t have to add the items manually?

posts.author: Guido (Guido)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, having the option to save products as separate items and adding them directly from a fixed a list would help greatly when doing quotes.

posts.author: Tracy (Tracy Emma Pontin)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you could automate the ‘item’ field to pull information from specified columns

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
You might want to check out the Paysaro app. It allows you create invoices, quotes etc by selecting items right from your monday.com board.
If you have any questions, you can always reach out support@kolaai.com
